5 things to avoid during a lightning storm
Stay off corded phones, computers &other electrical equipment that put you in direct contact with electricity. Avoid plumbing-including sinks, baths,faucets. Stay away from windows,doors, porches.Do not lie on concrete floors or lean against concrete walls.
